temporal_description: A static, wide shot captures the interior of a modern, multi-level office building. The camera is positioned on an upper landing, looking down a central staircase and across a long, open-plan workspace. The architecture is industrial, with concrete structures, metal railings, and rows of desks on either side. In the background, several people in business attire are visible. Some are walking down the stairs, while others are seated at their desks, working. The lighting is functional and cool-toned. In the upper left corner of the frame, the Chinese characters "风行网" are displayed in white. The camera remains stationary throughout the shot. A male narrator speaks in a calm, serious, and authoritative tone, delivering information as if from an official report. His voice is steady and clear, conveying a sense of factual importance. "根据闭路电视的录像，黄警司四点十五分进入大厦。" (According to the CCTV footage, Superintendent Wong entered the building at 4:15.) The audio is clean, with no background music or sound effects, placing all the focus on the spoken information.
